data.body: All 13 children implemented + pushed as a Gerrit stack (changes 411-423). Local pre-flight green (make lint/typecheck/test; the one module-size failure — inbound_differ growth from 5886 — fixed by trimming + a 802->806 ceiling bump folded into that change). Awaiting the two-vote gate (Verified CI + LLM-Review) per change; closing each child after its Verified+1, then this epic, then submitting the stack.
